system.description: Cryosene cans are metal fuel canisters capable of holding 5 gallons of cryosene. They can be used to refill cryosene burning equipment, though it won’t even put a dent in the train’s fuel tank. Cryosene can be siphoned from the train to the can with negligible impact on the train’s fuel stores. When holding 3 or more gallons, it’s Load increases to 2.
